pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Nightmare Stalker feels like a more broken and cruel version of a cave-hunting creature.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It gives off the feeling of something damaged, fast, and built to chase.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It feels aggressive and unstable, which makes each encounter more urgent.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)The horror comes from raw pursuit and the sense that it will not stop cleanly.
